serviceDescription: With Amazon Comprehend, you only pay for what you use. You are charged based on the amount of text processed on a monthly basis. Amazon Comprehend provides natural language processing, topic modeling, and Custom Classification capabilities, enabling a broad range of applications that can analyze text.

serviceSelector.title: Amazon Comprehend
